[Congressional Bills 104th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 31 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                In the House of Representatives, U. S.,

                                                       January 9, 1995.
    Resolved, That the following named Members be, and they are hereby, elected 
to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Government Reform and Oversight: Cardiss Collins, Illinois; 
Henry A. Waxman, California; Tom Lantos, California; Robert E. Wise, Jr., West 
Virginia; Major R. Owens, New York; Edolphus Towns, New York; John M. Spratt, 
Jr., South Carolina; Louise McIntosh Slaughter, New York; Paul E. Kanjorski, 
Pennsylvania; Gary A. Condit, California; Collin C. Peterson, Minnesota; Bernie 
Sanders, Vermont; Karen L. Thurman, Florida; Carolyn B. Maloney, New York; 
Thomas M. Barrett, Wisconsin; Gene Taylor, Mississippi; Barbara-Rose Collins, 
Michigan; *Eleanor Holmes Norton, D.C. (Delegate); James P. Moran, Virginia; 
Gene Green, Texas; Carrie P. Meek, Florida; Frank Mascara, Pennsylvania; and 
Chaka Fattah, Pennsylvania.
    Committee on Resources: George Miller, California; Nick J. Rahall, II, West 
Virginia; Bruce F. Vento, Minnesota; Dale E. Kildee, Michigan; Pat Williams, 
Montana; Sam Gejdenson, Connecticut; Bill Richardson, New Mexico; Peter A. 
DeFazio, Oregon; *Eni F.H. Faleomavaega, American Samoa (Delegate); Tim Johnson, 
South Dakota; Neil Abercrombie, Hawaii; Gerry E. Studds, Massachusetts; W.J. 
(Billy) Tauzin, Louisiana; Solomon P. Ortiz, Texas; Calvin M. Dooley, 
California; *Carlos A. Romero-Barcelo, Puerto Rico; Nathan Deal, Georgia; 
Maurice D. Hinchey, New York; *Robert A. Underwood, Guam (Delegate); and Sam 
Farr, California.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
